title: Cozy Café
description: A cozy café mod with desserts, drinks, and main meals. Requires Cozy Ingredients.
body:
## Cozy Café 
**Cozy Café** is a café and restaurant-themed food expansion mod that builds on Cozy Ingredients and adds over 50 new meals, drinks, and desserts to Minecraft!

Turn your base into a fully functioning café, restaurant, or bakery with a massive variety of cozy foods. This mod includes toasts, burgers, juices, donuts, ice cream, pies, ramen, and many more!

![List of items in 1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3556e0ea05a55f7677fe5467eda8f94eba361571.png)

## Current Version Support
- Supported on Fabric 1.20.1 so far
- 1.21+ support planned
- Forge/NeoForge support is not yet planned tho, might come after we add more content

## ⚠️ This mod requires [Cozy Ingredients](https://modrinth.com/mod/cozy-ingredients-mod) mod!
If you need any help or have any suggestions for future updates, please join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/QwH2ZQa)!

## ✨ Discover more of our projects on our website!
